rootCauseHypothesis: The deployed site likely does not render the expected results-screen button because the app is either starting on the wrong screen (Guild/Barracks instead of results), or the BACK TO GUILD element is conditionally omitted due to a routing/state bug, failed hydration, or deployment mismatch. As a result, the test cannot find data-testid='back-to-guild' in the DOM. Underlying error: TEST BLOCKED: Clicked button "DEPLOY ARENA"

recommendedFixTarget.rationale: Ensure the results flow renders the expected BACK TO GUILD control with data-testid='back-to-guild' on the post-combat/results screen. If the app is currently landing on Guild/Barracks instead of the results screen, fix the routing/state transition so the test reaches the results UI, or add the missing button to the visible results view and wire it to return to the guild screen. Also verify the element is not hidden behind conditional rendering, hydration timing, or a broken feature flag, and that the deployed build matches the tested version.
